Who: South Africa vs Canada What: FIFA World Cup 2026 – round of 32 Where: Los Angeles Stadium in Los Angeles, United States When: Sunday June 28, at 12pm (19:00 GMT) How to follow: We’ll have all the build-up on Al Jazeera Sport from 16:00 GMT ahead of our live text commentary stream.

The first match of the round of 32 at World Cup 2026 features two sides that played in the first and second game of the tournament, as South Africa take on tournament co-hosts Canada.

news_items.title: South Africa vs. Canada - Kick-off time, team news, how to watch World Cup round of 32 clash - ESPN
news_items.author: Leonard Solms
news_items.text:
South Africa vs. Canada - Kick-off time, team news, how to watch World Cup round of 32 clash - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

play

Bafana Bafana will head to Los Angeles off the back of a shock 1-0 win over South Korea to face Canada in their first ever FIFA World Cup knockout game on Sunday.

The fact that it will be Canada's first knockout game at the tournament, too, deserves no small mention. South Africa appeared previously at the World Cup in 1998, 2002 and 2010, while Canada played in 1986 and 2022. All prior campaigns for both of these teams resulted in group stage exits.

South Africa looked destined for another when they lost the opening game of the tournament to co-hosts Mexico 2-0 before conceding the first goal in their second game against Czechia.

Teboho Mokoena levelled the scores in the 83rd minute of that game, and then Thapelo Maseko's 63rd-minute winner handed South Africa a memorable 1-0 win over South Korea to seal second place in Group A.

Canada began their Group B fixtures with a 1-1 draw to Bosnia & Herzegovina before an impressive 6-0 demolition of Qatar. Despite a 2-1 loss to Switzerland in their most recent game, Jesse Marsch led his si

news_items.text:
South Africa vs Canada Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# South Africa vs Canada Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

South Africa vs Canada clash in Los Angeles for their historic 2026 World Cup Round of 32 knockout. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

June 27, 2026

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

June 27, 2026

# South Africa vs Canada Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Two nations chasing history meet at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles, with a place in the Round of 16 on the line. This is the first World Cup knockout match either South Africa or Canada has ever played, so whoever wins breaks new ground. South Africa arrive on a high after stunning South Korea to escape Group A, while Canada come through Group B but missed the chance to host this tie at home after a final-day loss to Switzerland.

The market makes Canada the

Story by

South Africa vs Canada – Match preview and team news

South Africa and Canada face off in their first ever knockout fixture in a World Cup as they prepare for the Round of 32 match on Sunday at the Los Angeles Stadium.

## South Africa vs Canada – Match preview and team news

Date: Sunday, 28th June.

Kick-off: 8pm BST.

Venue: Los Angeles Stadium, Inglewood, California, USA.

## South Africa team news

South Africa enters this historic World Cup Round of 32 clash with significant squad adjustments.

Advertisement

Advertisement

Teboho Mokoena returns to the squad after serving a mandatory one-match suspension during the group stage finale against South Korea due to accumulated yellow cards.

However, head coach Hugo Broos remains without attacking midfielder Themba Zwane. South Africa lost their appeal to overturn Zwane's red-card suspension extension, forcing him to serve a three-game ban following his ejection aga

play

Bafana Bafana will head to Los Angeles off the back of a shock 1-0 win over South Korea to face Canada in their first ever FIFA World Cup knockout game on Sunday.

The fact that it will be Canada's first knockout game at the tournament, too, deserves no small mention. South Africa appeared previously at the World Cup in 1998, 2002 and 2010, while Canada played in 1986 and 2022. All prior campaigns for both of these teams resulted in group stage exits.

South Africa looked destined for another when they lost the opening game of the tournament to co-hosts Mexico 2-0 before conceding the first goal in their second game against Czechia.

Teboho Mokoena levelled the scores in the 83rd minute of that game, and then Thapelo Maseko's 63rd-minute winner handed South Africa a memorable 1-0 win over South Korea to seal second place in Group A.

Canada began their Group B fixtures with a 1-1 draw to Bosnia & Herzegovina before an impressive 6-0 demolition of Qatar. Despite a 2-1 loss to Switzerland in their most recent game, Jesse Marsch led his si"}

# South Africa vs Canada Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Two nations chasing history meet at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles, with a place in the Round of 16 on the line. This is the first World Cup knockout match either South Africa or Canada has ever played, so whoever wins breaks new ground. South Africa arrive on a high after stunning South Korea to escape Group A, while Canada come through Group B but missed the chance to host this tie at home after a final-day loss to Switzerland.

South Africa vs Canada – Match preview and team news

South Africa and Canada face off in their first ever knockout fixture in a World Cup as they prepare for the Round of 32 match on Sunday at the Los Angeles Stadium.

## South Africa vs Canada – Match preview and team news

Date: Sunday, 28th June.

Kick-off: 8pm BST.

Venue: Los Angeles Stadium, Inglewood, California, USA.

## South Africa team news

South Africa enters this historic World Cup Round of 32 clash with significant squad adjustments.

Advertisement

Advertisement

Teboho Mokoena returns to the squad after serving a mandatory one-match suspension during the group stage finale against South Korea due to accumulated yellow cards.
